content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against 917e4503, including the FsMilestoneStore test counter and the new/expanded CLI and requirements drafting tests. I found no correctness, safety, or robustness issues. Targeted legacy-path tests, cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings, and nix build all passed.

## Amendments

None.
